topics.title: Zosia Mamet Joins HBO's Industry For Season 5
topics.angle: Zosia Mamet joins the cast of HBO's 'Industry' for its fifth and final season.

sources.headline: Zosia Mamet Joins HBO s Industry For Season 5
sources.summary: Girls star Zosia Mamet is returning to HBO, joining the cast of Industry for the financial thriller s upcoming fifth and final season. She will play Carmen Dame, a fitness influencer turned wellness tech founder and CEO. Filming on the eight-episode final installment of the Bad Wolf-produced HBO/BBC drama is set to begin the first week [ ]

sources.headline: Industry Season 5 Casts Zosia Mamet
sources.summary: Zosia Mamet has joined the upcoming fifth season of Industry at HBO, Variety has learned. As previously announced, Season 5 of the British finance industry drama will be its last. Mamet will play Carmen Dame, who is described as a fitness influencer turned wellness tech founder and CEO. The series cast also includes: Myha’la, Marisa [ ]

sources.headline: Zosia Mamet Joins ‘Industry’ Season 5
sources.summary: The ‘Girls’ actress will join the HBO and BBC series as a new character for its final season.

sources.headline: Morning Show to End With Season 5 at Apple TV
sources.summary: The sun is setting on The Morning Show. Variety has learned that the Apple TV drama will end with its upcoming fifth season. It is slated to debut in 2027.
